records.ety: [LL. curatus, prop., one who is charged with the care (L. cura) of souls. See Cure, n., and cf. Cur]

defs: One who has the cure of souls; originally, any clergyman, but now usually limited to one who assists a rector or vicar.
quotes: All this the good old man performed alone, He spared no pains, for curate he had none.
